The Spirit (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,806,188Details
International Box Office $19,200,000
Worldwide Box Office $39,006,188
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,547,122
Total $20,547,122

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,463,278 (32.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,509 opening theaters/2,509 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,845,341

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2008 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: April 14th, 2009 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of stylized violence and action, some sexual content and brief nudity
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself
Plot point: Crime
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, OddLot Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
